txtInfoBmwCardataApi: This adapter uses the new BMW CarData API with OAuth2 authentication and real-time MQTT streaming.
txtSetupInstructions: Setup Instructions: 1. Visit BMW ConnectedDrive portal (https://www.bmw.de/de-de/mybmw/vehicle-overview/) 2. Go to CarData section 3. Generate a client ID 4. Subscribe to API and streaming services 5. Configure data descriptors
txtCardataStreamingSetup: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: CarData Streaming Setup - After creating your Client ID, you MUST activate CarData Streaming and manually select ALL 244 data points in the BMW portal. Go to CarData > Data Descriptors > Select all categories and individual data points. Without this step, real-time MQTT streaming will not work!
hlpClientId: Client ID from BMW ConnectedDrive portal CarData section. If it doesn't work, try making all letters lowercase.
hlpCardataStreamingUsername: REQUIRED: Your CarData Streaming username (different from your BMW login). Find this in BMW ConnectedDrive portal under CarData > Streaming section. Without this, MQTT streaming will not work!
lblInterval: Update interval for telematic data (in minutes)
hlpInterval: Automatic telematic data fetching interval. Set to 0 to disable automatic updates. Minimum 10 minutes due to quota limits (50 calls per 24h). Other API endpoints can be triggered manually via bmw.0.VIN.remote.
hlpIgnorelist: Comma-separated list of VINs to ignore (e.g., VIN1,VIN2,VIN3)
hlpReverseGeocode: Convert GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude) to street address using OpenStreetMap Nominatim. Updates after position has not changed for 30 seconds.
txtApiNote: Telematic data is fetched automatically based on the interval above. Other API endpoints (basicData, chargingHistory, image, locationBasedChargingSettings, smartMaintenanceTyreDiagnosis) can be triggered manually via bmw.0.VIN.remote. in each vehicle. BasicData is fetched once after login.
